name: plan-task-breakdown
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>analyze@panel(3)>plan>review>reflect>handoff>audit |
 scope: repo|diff|paths(glob,...) |
 policy: evidence,quality-gates{docs,compat},deterministic-output |
 lens: eisenhower |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: TARGET_SCOPE
required_inputs.description: Bounded scope of the planned work.

required_inputs.name: PLAN_OUTPUT_PATH
required_inputs.description: Path where the implementation plan must be created or updated. Defaults to `plans/IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md` when omitted. The plans/ directory is created if it does not exist.

required_inputs.name: TASKS_OUTPUT_PATH
required_inputs.description: Path where the task table must be created or updated. Defaults to `plans/TASKS.md` when omitted. The plans/ directory is created if it does not exist.

required_inputs.name: ARTIFACT_MODE
required_inputs.description: Whether the planning artifacts are being created from scratch or updated in place. Defaults to `create` when omitted.

required_inputs.name: CONSTRAINTS
required_inputs.description: Compatibility, rollout, time, safety, and non-goal constraints.

required_inputs.name: EXISTING_ARTIFACTS
required_inputs.description: Existing planning docs that must be updated in place.
